name: Baked Potatoes, Stuffed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Prick the skins of the potatoes with a fork.
3. Lightly oil your hands and rub the oil onto the potatoes with a fork.
4. Place the potatoes in the oven and bake until done (about 35-40 minutes).
5. Reduce the heat to 325 degrees.
6. Remove the potatoes from the oven and cut off a thin slice from each.
7. Hollow out the centers, being careful to leave the shell intact.
8. Mash the centers with sour half and half, salt, pepper, and chives in a mixer.
9. Fill the shells, heaping high.
10. Bake on aluminum foil until heated through and the top is lightly browned (about 1/2 hour).
